items.title: A profile of Nscale founder Josh Payne, a former coal miner in Australia who moved to London and started the data center developer in 2024 amid the AI boom (Adam Satariano/New York Times)

items.title_zh: Nscale 创始人乔什·佩恩 (Josh Payne) 简介，他曾是澳大利亚煤矿工人，在人工智能热潮期间移居伦敦，并于 2024 年创办了数据中心开发商（Adam Satariano/纽约时报）

items.title: Sources: Chinese AI circuit board maker Victory Giant plans a Hong Kong IPO as soon as April that may raise $2B+; Chinese regulators approved the IPO last week (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Sources: Chinese AI circuit board maker Victory Giant plans a Hong Kong IPO as soon as April that may raise $2B+; Chinese regulators approved the IPO last week (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Sources: Chinese AI circuit board maker Victory Giant plans a Hong Kong IPO as soon as April that may raise $2B+; Chinese regulators approved the IPO last week (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 消息来源：中国人工智能电路板制造商胜利巨人计划最早于 4 月份在香港 IPO，融资额可能超过 20 亿美元；中国监管机构上周批准了首次公开募股（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 消息来源：中国人工智能电路板制造商胜利巨人计划最早于 4 月份在香港 IPO，融资额可能超过 20 亿美元；中国监管机构上周批准了首次公开募股（彭博社） / Sources: Chinese AI circuit board maker Victory Giant plans a Hong Kong IPO as soon as April that may raise $2B+; Chinese regulators approved the IPO last week (Bloomberg)

items.title: UK data center developer Nscale raised a $2B Series C led by Aker and 8090 Industries at a $14.6B valuation and adds Sheryl Sandberg and Nick Clegg to its board (Mark Bergen/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: UK data center developer Nscale raised a $2B Series C led by Aker and 8090 Industries at a $14.6B valuation and adds Sheryl Sandberg and Nick Clegg to its board (Mark Bergen/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: UK data center developer Nscale raised a $2B Series C led by Aker and 8090 Industries at a $14.6B valuation and adds Sheryl Sandberg and Nick Clegg to its board (Mark Bergen/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 英国数据中心开发商 Nscale 筹集了由 Aker 和 8090 Industries 领投的 2B 轮 C 轮融资，估值为 14.6B 美元，并将 Sheryl Sandberg 和 Nick Clegg 添加到其董事会（Mark Bergen/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 英国数据中心开发商 Nscale 筹集了由 Aker 和 8090 Industries 领投的 2B 轮 C 轮融资，估值为 14.6B 美元，并将 Sheryl Sandberg 和 Nick Clegg 添加到其董事会（Mark Bergen/彭博社） / UK data center developer Nscale raised a $2B Series C led by Aker and 8090 Industries at a $14.6B valuation and adds Sheryl Sandberg and Nick Clegg to its board (Mark Bergen/Bloomberg)

items.title: A Lloyds-commissioned study of 5,000 people in the UK finds that 50%+ of the adults used generative AI platforms for financial advice; ChatGPT was the most used (Mary McDougall/Financial Times)
items.title_original: A Lloyds-commissioned study of 5,000 people in the UK finds that 50%+ of the adults used generative AI platforms for financial advice; ChatGPT was the most used (Mary McDougall/Financial Times)
items.title_en: A Lloyds-commissioned study of 5,000 people in the UK finds that 50%+ of the adults used generative AI platforms for financial advice; ChatGPT was the most used (Mary McDougall/Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 劳埃德银行委托对英国 5,000 人进行的一项研究发现，超过 50% 的成年人使用生成式人工智能平台获取财务建议； ChatGPT 使用最多（Mary McDougall/金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 劳埃德银行委托对英国 5,000 人进行的一项研究发现，超过 50% 的成年人使用生成式人工智能平台获取财务建议； ChatGPT 使用最多（Mary McDougall/金融时报） / A Lloyds-commissioned study of 5,000 people in the UK finds that 50%+ of the adults used generative AI platforms for financial advice; ChatGPT was the most used (Mary McDougall/Financial Times)

items.title: Advice to developers: make software that agents want, with API-first design, as AI agents, instead of humans, will become the primary users of future software (Aaron Levie/@levie)
items.title_original: Advice to developers: make software that agents want, with API-first design, as AI agents, instead of humans, will become the primary users of future software (Aaron Levie/@levie)
items.title_en: Advice to developers: make software that agents want, with API-first design, as AI agents, instead of humans, will become the primary users of future software (Aaron Levie/@levie)
items.title_zh: 给开发人员的建议：通过 API 优先设计，制作智能体想要的软件，因为人工智能智能体将取代人类，成为未来软件的主要用户 (Aaron Levie/@levie)
items.title_bilingual: 给开发人员的建议：通过 API 优先设计，制作智能体想要的软件，因为人工智能智能体将取代人类，成为未来软件的主要用户 (Aaron Levie/@levie) / Advice to developers: make software that agents want, with API-first design, as AI agents, instead of humans, will become the primary users of future software (Aaron Levie/@levie)

items.title: I'm a 78-year-old retiree who's vibe coding. Being out of the workforce doesn't mean we can't use AI like tech pros.

items.title_en: I'm a 78-year-old retiree who's vibe coding. Being out of the workforce doesn't mean we can't use AI like tech pros.

items.title: A study of ~1,500 US workers finds AI use can reduce burnout but also cause "AI brain fry", a mental fatigue from using AI tools beyond one's cognitive capacity (Harvard Business Review)
items.title_original: A study of ~1,500 US workers finds AI use can reduce burnout but also cause "AI brain fry", a mental fatigue from using AI tools beyond one's cognitive capacity (Harvard Business Review)
items.title_en: A study of ~1,500 US workers finds AI use can reduce burnout but also cause "AI brain fry", a mental fatigue from using AI tools beyond one's cognitive capacity (Harvard Business Review)
items.title_zh: 一项针对约 1,500 名美国工人的研究发现，人工智能的使用可以减少倦怠，但也会导致“人工智能脑损伤”，即使用超出认知能力的人工智能工具而产生的精神疲劳（《哈佛商业评论》）
items.title_bilingual: 一项针对约 1,500 名美国工人的研究发现，人工智能的使用可以减少倦怠，但也会导致“人工智能脑损伤”，即使用超出认知能力的人工智能工具而产生的精神疲劳（《哈佛商业评论》） / A study of ~1,500 US workers finds AI use can reduce burnout but also cause "AI brain fry", a mental fatigue from using AI tools beyond one's cognitive capacity (Harvard Business Review)
